case_title: US BANK N.A. N.D. VS. WILLIAM E. GUAZZALOCA et al

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF US BANK N.A. N.D. AS TO DEFENDANT GUAZZALOCA, WILLIAM E.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF US BANK N.A. N.D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUAZZALOCA, WILLIAM E. $9,647.64 PRINCIPAL, $2,750.88 INTEREST, $439.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,838.02, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF US BANK N.A. N.D. AS TO DEFENDANT GUAZZALOCA, WILLIAM E. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-23-2012
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF US BANK N.A. N.D. SERVED FEB-13-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GUAZZALOCA, WILLIAM E.
DECLARATION RE: UNAVAILABILITY OF ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT; COMPUTATION OF INTEREST; NOTICE PURSUANT TO CCP (B)(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF US BANK N.A. N.D.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $439.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GUAZZALOCA, WILLIAM E.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF US BANK N.A. N.D. AS TO DEFENDANT GUAZZALOCA, WILLIAM E.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
